patterns.manualTitle: 🛠️ Flink: Workflow de contribution / Contribution Workflow

commands: echo 'Commit format: type(scope): message | Types: feat, fix, chore, refactor, docs, test, style'

description.fr: ✍️ Convention des commits - ex: feat(auth): add forgot password flow
description.en: ✍️ Commit convention - e.g: feat(auth): add forgot password flow

description.fr: 📋 Liste complète des types de commits acceptés
description.en: 📋 Full list of accepted commit types

description.fr: 📝 Lancer changeset - obligatoire avant chaque PR qui modifie un package
description.en: 📝 Run changeset - required before every PR that modifies a package

description.fr: ✅ Checklist pré-PR - lint + tests + build doivent tous passer
description.en: ✅ Pre-PR checklist - lint + tests + build must all pass
